title: Create F&M 3
description: Create F&M 3 is the latest evolution of the Create: F&M series, bringing unparalleled mechanical automation and engineering creativity to Minecraft. Built around the Create mod and its powerful add-ons, this modpack lets you design intricate contraptions,
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfdf02aea543a70f7b0c7bea546ac4d5bf69eb12.png)

**Create F&M 3 is the perfect Create experience. You can build factory´s, trains, contraptions and many many other things! Build your own trains, explore the brand new world gen, gather new items and blocks! Explore new structure´s. You can even play with your friends for free with e4mc!**

Currently not updated. Go download on Curse: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-fm3](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-fm3)
![Promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fd9e772f0a39ce1d5c1cec8501f0ec7d4b89382_0.webp)
[Need a server? Get 25% off your first month](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=855)
